sources.title: Phase 1 declared seed tables
sources.licence: repository-declared; source notes required per row before publication
sources.attribution: Ventus Ltd declared seed data with source notes
sources.notes: Used only to establish schema and first canonical entity list. Replace indicative rows with verified source-backed records before publication.

sources.title: GB DNO licence area boundaries
sources.licence: NESO Open Licence; verify per resource at fetch time
sources.attribution: Supported by National Energy SO Open Data
sources.notes: Source geometry may require reprojection to EPSG:4326 for RFC 7946 GeoJSON. Treat as approximate screening geometry.

sources.title: Electricity licence register
sources.licence: OGL v3 expected; verify before fetch
sources.attribution: Contains public sector information licensed under the Open Government Licence v3.0
sources.notes: Authoritative source for licensed DNO, IDNO, supplier and related electricity licence holders.

sources.title: Stable UK government public energy-data source class
sources.licence: OGL v3 expected for most datasets; verify per dataset
sources.attribution: Contains public sector information licensed under the Open Government Licence v3.0
sources.notes: Use stable folder name. Store publishing department as data lineage, not as folder identity.

sources.title: Ireland and Northern Ireland network public datasets
sources.attribution: Data attribution to be stored per dataset
sources.notes: Default restricted until ESB, EirGrid, SONI, NIE and regulator terms are confirmed.
